ddt:Target.Name: N_PB1D_TCU_V4.7
ddt:Target.Description:
12/01/18: Initial version of database as per CANdela file v0.1
2018/01/19 RNTBCI Sheela Initial Creation
2018/01/27 RNTBCI Sheela Update the Routine Service Details
2018/03/12 RNTBCI Ayyappan Update in System Identification Remove 4 DID's
2018/04/17 RNTBCI Abhishek DTC list updated
2018/04/24 RNTBCI Abhishek
Fault type 0x56 updated for DTC $DA31 Functional address code changed to $78
2018/05/04 Sheela Hariharan RNTBCI 1. VDIAG modifeid as $5A 2. Configuration DIDs added: Vehicle Manufacturer Part number Configuration reference part number Vehicel defintiion Zone Service Ecall Service Probe Service TOW Service TOW MAX Activation time Service SSLC Service HB or OA Service V.H.M Service R.Diag Reserved 1 Reserved 2 Reserved 3
2018/05/08 Abhishek RNTBCI DTC $DA23 and $DA24 deleted
2018/07/13 Abhishek Basu RNTBCI Updated as per candela file 1.2
2018/08/02 Abhishek Basu RNTBCI Byte length modified to 2 bytes for DID "Service TOW MAX Activation time(0x6021)" Numeric list updated for DID 0x6001 and 0x6002 CA certificate and TCU certificate read request removed from screen
2018/08/24 Abhishek Basu RNTBCI
Tow Upload Period Batcut(0x8009) removed Removed DTCs for "Ecall Button (0xDA13 - 0x12, 0x13 and 0x71)" from Fault Memory.
2018/09/05 Abhishek Basu RNTBCI
Updated data type as "HEX" for "TCU TRACABILITY"

Item.Text: Time synchronisation with server 1 (GDC) activated and with GPS if no service on server 1 is active
Time synchronisation with server 1 (GDC), with GPS or PLGW
No retry until next ON cycle

Data.Name: Remote EV Activation Acknowledgement Time Out
Max Time to Send Random Upload

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level oor/ zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: ECUprogressingTimeN_Cs
Data.Comment: Time until transmission of next Consecutive Frame

Data.Name: ECUprogressingTimeN_Br
Data.Comment: Time until transmission of next Flow Control

Data.Name: NETWORK_MONITORING.NOKtoOK
Data.Comment: representing last time the TCU network status changed from NOK to OK

Data.Name: NETWORK_MONITORING.OKtoNOK
Data.Comment: representing last time the TCU network status changed from OK to NOK

List.Item: Response to control status when test in progress

Item.Text: Control stopped by Control option parameter set to 'Stop control'

Data.Name: System Supplier GA Number.General Assembly Number
CA Certificate.Total Number of Certificate Blocks
CA Certificate.Index of Current Certificate Block
TCU Certificate.Total Number of Certificate Blocks
TCU Certificate.Index of Current Certificate Block
TCU Private Key Certificate.Total Number of Key Blocks
TCU Private Key Certificate.Index of Current Key Block
TCU Private Key Certificate.Certificate Key Block Bytes
Main Server Configuration File Parameters.PID User ID
Main Server Configuration File Parameters.PWD Password
Main Server Configuration File Parameters.OBS URL
Main Server Configuration File Parameters.OBS PORT
RTC SW Number.RTC SW Reference Number
RTC SW Number.RTC SW Version Number
RTC Time.Miliseconds from beginning of the week
RTC Bootloader SW Number.RTC Bootloader SW Version Number
RTC Bootloader SW Number.RTC Bootloader SW Reference Number

Item.Text: TCU not connected to any Data Channel

Data.Name: SRBLID.Routine Completed OK - SIM Lock Status
SRBLID.Routine Completed OK - Net registration state
SRBLID.Routine Completed OK - List of bands supported
SRBLID.Routine Completed OK - Number of Cells
SRBLID.Routine Completed OK - AT Command response valid size
SRBLID.Routine Completed OK - AT Command response

Item.Text: Internal Comm Stack AT Command Error

Data.Name: SRBLID.Routine Completed OK - MSISDN of the external SIM
SRBLID.Routine Completed NOK - Certificates Fail Status

Item.Text: Routine Complete and NOK - Check Version Error
Routine Complete and NOK - S19 Data Error
Routine Complete and NOK - App Erase Failed
Routine Complete and NOK - Firmware Donwload Flash Write Error
Routine Complete and NOK - USB Bootloader Self Check Error
Routine Complete and NOK - USB Bootloader Programming Session Timeout

Data.Name: SRBLID.Rotuine Completd OK - Open Circuit Voltage (msb)
SRBLID.Rotuine Completd OK - Open Circuit Voltage (lsb)
SRBLID.Rotuine Completd OK - Battery Internal Impedance(msb)
SRBLID.Rotuine Completd OK - Battery Internal Impedance(lsb)
SRBLID.Rotuine Completd OK - Battery SOH OK/NOK
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.Mileage when PMC last 12th reset detected in km
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.Mileage when RTC last 12th reset detected in km
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.Mileage when RTC last reset detected
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.Mileage when telematic last reset detected
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.Mileage when telematic last reset detected in km
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.Mileage when WIFI last 12th reset detected in km
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.Mileage when WIFI last reset detected
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.WIFI last reset cause
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.WIFI last 12th reset cause
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.Telematic last 12th reset cause
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.Telematic last reset cause
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.Mileage when PMC last reset detected
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.PMC last reset cause
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.PMC last 12th reset cause
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.RTC last 12th reset cause
Last Unexpected Reset Causes.RTC last reset cause
Last GPS NMEA Message.Valid NMEA message size
PMC Bootloader SW Number.PMC Bootloader SW Version Number
PMC Bootloader SW Number.PMC Bootloader SW Reference Number
WD Configuration.Value of the PMC WD configuration
Factory Area.Bytes sent in write / Reserved in read
Factory Area.Data to be programmed inside Factory Area
Factory Area.Offset inside factory area in write / Reserved in read
LogZone First Programming in Plant.Identification frame
Hour, Minute of the First Software Download
LogZone First Programming in Plant.REPROG Zone description

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

CA Certificate.Index of Current Certificate Block

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification_R1
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request for old ECU

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR1
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

DataItem.Name: Hour, Minute of the First Software Download
Hour, Minute of the First Software Download
Hour, Minute of the First Software Download

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Test.Description: TCU Certificate Not Set - Not Programmed
CA Certificate Not Set - Not Programmed
Invalid TCU Private Key - Not Programmed

Label.Text: - Hard Reset : Simulates TCU power ON
- Key OFF ON Reset : Used in factory
- Soft Reset : restart the application without reinitializing previously learned configuration data
- Configuration Reset : Reset configuration parameters to default values

Button.Text: Read Vehicle Manufacturer Spare Part Number
Write PVT TX Time Limit Max
Read PVT TX Time Limit Max
Write Service Tow Max Activation Time
Read Service Tow Max Activation Time
Write Service HB or OA Activation
Read Service HB or OA Activation
